mapper.select: select id as id, record_no as recordNo, register_id as registerId, pet_id as petId, owner_id as ownerId, doctor_id as doctorId, doctor_name as doctorName, type as type, title as title, content as content, chief_complaint as chiefComplaint, symptoms as symptoms, present_illness as presentIllness, past_history as pastHistory, physical_exam as physicalExam, auxiliary_exam as auxiliaryExam, diagnosis as diagnosis, prescription as prescription, treatment_plan as treatmentPlan, doctor_advice as doctorAdvice, hospital as hospital, attachments as attachments, record_date as recordDate, status as status, remark as remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from medical_record where id = #{id}

select id as id, record_no as recordNo, register_id as registerId, pet_id as petId, owner_id as ownerId, doctor_id as doctorId, doctor_name as doctorName, type as type, title as title, content as content, chief_complaint as chiefComplaint, symptoms as symptoms, present_illness as presentIllness, past_history as pastHistory, physical_exam as physicalExam, auxiliary_exam as auxiliaryExam, diagnosis as diagnosis, prescription as prescription, treatment_plan as treatmentPlan, doctor_advice as doctorAdvice, hospital as hospital, attachments as attachments, record_date as recordDate, status as status, remark as remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from medical_record order by id desc
